section_labels.classes: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#EB8A2C] font-semibold mb-4 block

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#EB8A2C] text-white hover:bg-[#D97A1B] transition-colors px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: rounded-full border border-[#EB8A2C] text-[#EB8A2C] hover:bg-[#EB8A2C]/10 transition-colors px-6 py-3 font-medium

components.name: Navigation
components.instructions: Sticky top nav. bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md z-50. Include Logo text ('Toothfully Yours' in Playfair), center links, right primary CTA button.

components.name: Hero
components.layout: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center min-h-[80vh] px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 max-w-7xl mx-auto
components.instructions: Headline text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-playfair italic text-[#545454]. Subhead text-lg text-gray-600. Flex row for buttons.

components.name: Services
components.layout: py-24 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 text-center max-w-7xl mx-auto
components.instructions: 4-col grid on desktop, 1 col mobile. Each card: Circular photo (w-48 h-48 mx-auto object-cover rounded-full shadow-lg border-4 border-white), followed by h4 heading.

components.name: About
components.layout: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-16 py-24 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 items-center max-w-7xl mx-auto
components.instructions: Text on left, doctor photo on right. Image should have soft shadow and rounded-3xl or circular crop.

components.name: Values
components.layout: py-24 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 text-center text-white max-w-7xl mx-auto
components.instructions: Bento grid for 5 cards. Top row: 3 cards (grid-cols-3). Bottom row: 2 cards (flex justify-center or grid-cols-2). Cards have bg-white/5 border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-2xl. Use Lucide icons colored #EB8A2C.

components.name: Team
components.layout: py-24 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 text-center max-w-7xl mx-auto
components.instructions: 3-col grid. Circular photos (w-56 h-56 mx-auto object-cover rounded-full), name in Playfair italic, role in DM sans #EB8A2C.

components.name: Testimonials
components.layout: py-24 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 text-center max-w-7xl mx-auto
components.instructions: 3 cards side-by-side. Cards: bg-white p-8 rounded-3xl shadow-sm. Use quote icons in #EB8A2C.

components.name: Gallery
components.layout: py-24 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 max-w-[1400px] mx-auto
components.instructions: Horizontal photo mosaic of 5 candid patient photos. Use grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4. Images should have warm tones, rounded-2xl, varying heights or aspect ratios to look like a mosaic.

components.name: Contact
components.layout: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-16 py-24 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 max-w-7xl mx-auto
components.instructions: Left: info stack (hours, phone, email, address, social icons). Right: Form using Netlify standard attributes (`data-netlify="true"`). Fields: Name, Phone, Email, Service dropdown, Message. Primary CTA to submit.

components.name: Footer
components.layout: py-12 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 text-white flex flex-col items-center text-center
components.instructions: Logo + tagline 'Cosmetic · Smiles · Restorations'. Nav links. Copyright.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. e.g., data-testid='hero-book-consultation', data-testid='contact-form', data-testid='contact-submit-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure Playfair Display and DM Sans are imported from Google Fonts in index.html.
Ensure tailwind.config.js is updated with custom colors (brand: #EB8A2C, bg-light: #F5F2EF, bg-dark: #545454, bg-warm: #E9E2DB) and custom font families.
Use Lucide-React for all icons and strictly color them #EB8A2C.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use exactly the URLs provided in the media object.
Maintain the layout structure: sections full width, internal containers bounded with padding.
Section labels MUST sit above headings: uppercase, small-caps, wide tracking, color #EB8A2C.
Mobile layout must stack into single column, with full-width CTAs. Increase top/bottom paddings generously to ensure luxury breathing room.
